What is the color of the earphone cable? A. Black B. White C. Silver D. Clear
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A hand with light skin tone manipulates white wired earphones featuring a flat cable and 3.5mm audio jack. The earphones rest on a light-colored wooden table surface with visible grain throughout the sequence. Initially, the earphones are enclosed within a clear crinkled plastic bag before being removed. White uppercase text in Russian appears overlaid at the bottom of the screen during the early segments.

Only designed with a flat cable C. Both initially contained within a plastic bag and designed with a flat cable D. Neither initially contained within a plastic bag nor designed with a flat cable

Describe the sequence of actions performed on the earphones from the beginning of the video until they are placed back on the table.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a hand touches a plastic bag containing white earphones; at 10s, the earphones are removed from the bag and lifted off the table; at 16s, the hand manipulates the tangled white cable to untangle it; at 18s, the hand holds the left earbud before releasing it onto the wooden surface.

canonical_answer: A black binder clip is attached to the white capsule-shaped object.
